chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision No. S – 237 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.290/2023 (XXII Rule 4) 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.1292/2019 (Stay) 11.03.2024 Mr. Illahi Bux Jamali, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this civil revision is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed applications. J U D G E Abdul Basit
